message:
test(messaging): add 35 unit tests for helper functions and edge cases

New tests cover previously untested helper functions and edge cases:

- python_json_type_name: all JSON value variants including int vs float
- python_value_repr: null, booleans, numbers, string escaping (single quotes),
  empty strings, arrays and objects
- send_message_has_explicit_to_recipients: None, empty/whitespace strings,
  valid names, empty arrays, arrays with empty strings, non-string values, null
- normalize_send_message_to_argument: string→array wrapping, valid array noop,
  absent field noop, non-string array items error, wrong type error
- normalize_send_message_cc_bcc_argument: null noop, string→array, valid array,
  non-string items error, absent field noop, object type error
- enqueue_message_lexical_index: fire-and-forget non-panic with valid args,
  None thread_id, and empty fields

Total messaging tests: 108 → 143

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>
